main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'oxidative degradation por monocloramina breakthrough GAC exhausted + ausencia SBS' literal.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (MECH bypass, envejecimiento normal, scaling/biofouling, cloro libre transitorio).

recommended_action.justification: Stop RO + replace/rebed GAC + total chlorine monitoring interlock + SBS dosing — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide C·T exposición total chloramine al RO feed últimos 45 días — discriminador (ppm·h). Match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: cloramina <0.05 + ORP +60 + rechazo cayó → MECH switch.
